hero.headline:
40 Years Transforming Hudson Valley
Landscapes
hero.subheadline: Your property deserves more than maintenance — it deserves a team with four decades of craftsmanship. From landscape design-build to certified tree care, Red Cedar delivers results that last generations. Just enjoy the view.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Complete Landscape & Tree Care<br class="hidden md:block">for Every Property
services.subtitle: From your first consultation to the final walkthrough, our ISA Certified Arborists and trained professionals handle every detail. One call covers everything your property needs.

cards.title: Landscape Design & Build
cards.description: Custom outdoor living spaces from concept to completion — walks, walls, patios, fire pits, pergolas, and outdoor kitchens designed for your lifestyle.

cards.title: Certified Tree Care
cards.description: Pruning, removals, cabling, bracing, and plant healthcare from ISA Certified Arborists. 100-foot crane service for complex jobs.

cards.title: Hardscaping & Stonework
cards.description: Walkways, retaining walls, patios, fire pits, and decorative stone features built to last. Expert craftsmanship that elevates your entire property.

cards.title: Land Clearing & Excavation
cards.description: Professional clearing, excavating, and hauling for residential and commercial sites. Preparing your land for its next chapter.

cards.title: Commercial Property Care
cards.description: Year-round grounds management for businesses and HOAs — landscape maintenance, seasonal plantings, and reliable snow management.

cards.title: Supply Yard & Nursery
cards.description: Our on-site yard stocks plants, trees, mulch, stone, and soil. Open to homeowners and contractors — get exactly what your project needs.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Landscape

steps.title: Schedule Your Consultation
steps.description: Tell us about your property and vision. We'll visit, assess the site, and provide an honest, detailed estimate — no pressure, no obligation.

steps.title: We Design & Build
steps.description: Our certified team handles every phase — design, materials, construction, and cleanup. You stay informed at every milestone without lifting a finger.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Property
steps.description: Your landscape is transformed and built to last. We stand behind our work and offer ongoing maintenance to keep it looking its best for years to come.

about.label: Why Hudson Valley Trusts Us
about.headline: Four Decades of Craftsmanship — Not Shortcuts
about.description: Founded in 1985 by Steve Relyea, Red Cedar Landscapes has spent over 40 years earning the trust of homeowners and businesses across the Hudson Valley. Our team of ISA Certified Arborists and trained professionals treats every property like our own — because our reputation in this community is everything. From Dutchess County to Fairfield County, we deliver results that stand the test of time.

features.title: ISA Certified & CTSP Trained
features.description: Our arborists hold ISA certification and Tree Care Industry Association safety credentials. Your trees and property are in expert hands.

features.title: 40+ Years, Same Standards
features.description: Since 1985, we have maintained an A+ BBB rating by doing the job right the first time. No shortcuts, no excuses.

features.title: 100% Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.description: Not happy with our work? We come back and make it right — no charge, no hassle. That is the Red Cedar promise.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project gets a detailed written estimate upfront. No hidden fees, no change-order games — just honest pricing for quality work.

guarantee.headline: Our "Built to Last" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any aspect of our work, we will return and make it right at no additional cost. We have built our reputation over 40 years on this promise — and we are not about to stop now. Your satisfaction is not negotiable.

faqs.question: How soon can you start my project?
faqs.answer: Most consultations are scheduled within one week. Project timelines depend on scope, but we pride ourselves on clear scheduling and keeping our commitments. Emergency tree work gets same-day or next-day response.

faqs.question: Do you serve my area in the Hudson Valley?
faqs.answer: We serve over 45 communities across Dutchess, Westchester, Putnam, and Columbia counties in New York, plus Fairfield County in Connecticut. If you are in the Hudson Valley region, chances are we have worked in your neighborhood.

faqs.question: Are your arborists actually certified?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our team includes ISA Certified Arborists and Certified Treecare Safety Professionals (CTSP) through the Tree Care Industry Association. We also hold a Connecticut Arborist license and carry full liability insurance.

faqs.question: Can you handle large tree removals?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We operate a 100-foot crane for complex tree work, along with professional rigging and removal equipment. No tree is too big or too difficult for our experienced crew.

faqs.question: Do you offer ongoing maintenance after a project?
faqs.answer: Yes. We provide complete lawn care, landscape maintenance, and commercial property management services. Many clients start with a design-build project and stay with us for year-round care.

testimonials.name: Hudson Valley Homeowner
testimonials.text: Red Cedar is very professional, very reliable and easy to work with. They re-graded our backyard, built stone walls and were able to solve some grading and slope challenges other landscape architects could not.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Customer
testimonials.text: I was extremely happy and impressed with the service, the workers, and the process. They were courteous, professional, creative, and met our needs at all times.

testimonials.name: Tree Service Client
testimonials.text: Red Cedar took down our trees very professionally, didn't scratch anything, were courteous and did a good clean up. The area was landscaped and seeded within a week. Highly recommend them as dependable, reliable, and efficient.

contact.headline:
Ready to Transform
Your Property?
contact.subtitle: Get a free consultation and honest estimate. No pressure, no obligation — just 40 years of expertise applied to your vision.
